description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a neatly groomed beard and short hair, dressed in formal attire. He is wearing a business suit with a collared shirt and a tie, giving a professional appearance suitable for an urban or office environment. The figure stands upright with a straight posture, arms at his sides, and feet together. The facial features are clearly defined, and the suit is tailored, with visible lapels and a structured fit. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the shoes are formal, matching the business attire. The overall look is that of a professional adult male, likely encountered in business districts or city streets.
description: A formally dressed adult male pedestrian in a business suit, standing upright with a professional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, tie, and upper body details of the business suit.
description_view_1: Side view with the profile of the head and the suit's silhouette, less facial detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the suit and the figure's posture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the other profile and the suit's structure.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and tie
